{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603232009387F6F8DF87A4B873E027A\"}"},"total":7},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7613781968393962265","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前看到最新章节、剧情方面主角确实如他人所说圣母、放到现实世界算老好人了、主角实力是顶尖那一批，但也不是最顶的那一批、还有主角的天赋我感觉没啥存在感[捂脸]、后面主角估计会把认识的人都弄过来自己的基地升级、幸好奴隶生物的也可以奴隶人要不然真扯淡了、这种老好人求生小说算是在求生小说一种罕见[吃瓜]对我而言能看下去给五星支持作者[思考]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772724472,"group_id":"7601798701710838808","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+gTJYIUMs141nKBZhY+c+SySEqZMmCtQ1MlEQDHKtCv","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a77e171a65d1427aae3990052788765a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776790135\u0026x-signature=ZxXDjD%2FN%2FS2HyJ%2Fjuy9KWe9xsN8%3D","user_id":"4130178566982286","user_name":"想变精神病"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4130178566982286","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601798701710838808","book_info":{"abstract":"一觉醒来，陈风和全蓝星人一起穿越到一个充满未知与危险的迷雾世界。\n这个世界虽然危机四伏，却也有各种机遇，陈风从零开始，收集物资建立庇护所，抵抗各种灾害与危险，最后乘上新世界的大风建立属于自己的城池，揭露世界神秘的面纱。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/5f43e49adb14eb77d86ff2315efa0b0c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"吃片午餐肉","author_id":"","book_id":"7601798701710838808","book_name":"迷雾求生：从破烂茅草屋开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#586870","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5870人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":8,
